2026-04-22T00:22:58.3107092Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-22T00:22:58.3107518Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-22T00:22:58.3107886Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-22T00:22:58.3108382Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m

CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 issue(s) can be created.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"Detailed issue description in Markdown. Do NOT repeat the title as a heading since it already appears as the issue's h1. Labels must exist in the repository.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"parent":{"description":"Parent issue number for creating sub-issues. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. The title appears as the main heading, so keep it brief and descriptive.","type":"string"}},"required":["title","body"],"type":"object"},"name":"create_issue"},{"description":"Report that a tool or capability needed to complete the task is not available, or share any information you deem important about missing functionality or limitations. Use this when required tools or data are unavailable and the task cannot be meaningfully performed. This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. 2026-04-22T00:25:56.5673176Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-22T00:25:43.059549882Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"safeoutputs","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"body":"## Documentation Gap\n\n**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover`\n**Service directory:** `sdk/storagemover/Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover/`\n**Triggered by:** commit b8b94c350 (PR #57153) by @azure-sdk\n\n## What Changed\n\nA new version (1.4.0) of the StorageMover management library was introduced, upgrading to API version 2025-12-01. The release adds significant new capabilities:\n\n- S3 with HMAC authentication endpoints (`S3WithHmacEndpointProperties`)\n- Azure Multi-Cloud Connector endpoints (`AzureMultiCloudConnectorEndpointProperties`)\n- Azure Storage NFS File Share endpoints (`AzureStorageNfsFileShareEndpointProperties`)\n- Job definition scheduling support (`StorageMoverScheduleInfo`, `StorageMoverScheduleFrequency`)\n- Data integrity validation for job definitions (`StorageMoverDataIntegrityValidation`)\n- New properties: `IsPermissionsPreserved`, `StorageMoverJobTriggerType`, `ScheduledExecutionOn`, `StorageMoverEndpointKind`, `Connections`\n\n## Gaps Found\n\n- **Examples section is empty of real code**: The README currently links only to a generic `aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples` URL — no inline code snippets demonstrate creating or using any StorageMover resource\n- **Key concepts section lacks service-specific content**: The section points to generic Azure SDK design principles but does not explain StorageMover-specific concepts (Storage Movers, Projects, Agents, Endpoints, Job Definitions, Job Runs, and their relationships)\n- **New v1.4.0 features are not documented in the README**: S3/HMAC endpoints, Multi-Cloud Connector endpoints, NFS File Share endpoints, job scheduling, and data integrity validation have no corresponding examples or explanation in the README\n- **No custom `tests/Samples/` files with `#region Snippet:` blocks**: Only auto-generated samples exist; there are no hand-crafted samples that walk through common scenarios to be pulled into README via `Update-Snippets.ps1`\n- **Troubleshooting section lacks service-specific guidance**: No mention of common issues specific to StorageMover (e.g., agent connectivity, endpoint misconfiguration, job failures)\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Modify files\n\n**Edit** `sdk/storagemover/Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover/README.md`:\n\n1. Replace the generic `## Key concepts` section with service-specific content:\n\n```markdown\n## Key concepts\n\nThe Azure Storage Mover SDK is organized around these core resources:\n\n- **StorageMover** (`StorageMoverResource`): The top-level resource representing a storage mover deployment in a resource group.\n- **Agent** (`StorageMoverAgentResource`): A registered hybrid compute resource that performs the actual data transfer.\n- **Endpoint** (`StorageMoverEndpointResource`): Represents a source or destination for migration jobs. Supported types include:\n  - `AzureStorageBlobContainerEndpointProperties` — Azure Blob Storage container\n  - `AzureStorageSmbFileShareEndpointProperties` — Azure Files SMB share\n  - `AzureStorageNfsFileShareEndpointProperties` — Azure Files NFS share (new in 1.4.0)\n  - `NfsMountEndpointProperties` — on-premises NFS mount\n  - `SmbMountEndpointProperties` — on-premises SMB share\n  - `S3WithHmacEndpointProperties` — S3-compatible storage with HMAC authentication (new in 1.4.0)\n  - `AzureMultiCloudConnectorEndpointProperties` — Multi-Cloud Connector endpoint (new in 1.4.0)\n- **Project** (`StorageMoverProjectResource`): A logical grouping of related job definitions.\n- **Job Definition** (`JobDefinitionResource`): Defines a migration task including source endpoint, target endpoint, associated agent, scheduling, and data integrity settings.\n- **Job Run** (`JobRunResource`): An individual execution instance of a job definition.\n```\n\n2. Replace the generic `## Examples` section with snippet placeholders:\n\n```markdown\n## Examples\n\n### Create a Storage Mover\n\n```C# Snippet:StorageMover_CreateOrUpdate\n```\n\n### Create an Azure Blob Container endpoint\n\n```C# Snippet:StorageMover_CreateBlobEndpoint\n```\n\n### Create a job definition with scheduling\n\n```C# Snippet:StorageMover_CreateJobDefinitionWithSchedule\n```\n\n### Start a job run\n\n```C# Snippet:StorageMover_StartJobRun\n```\n```\n\n3. Expand the `## Troubleshooting` section:\n\n```markdown\n## Troubleshooting\n\n- **Agent not registering**: Ensure the hybrid compute machine running the agent has outbound connectivity to Azure and that the `ARC_Resource_Bridge` VM extension is installed correctly.\n- **Job run stuck in `Queued` state**: Verify the agent assigned to the job definition has a `Connected` status (`StorageMoverAgentStatus.Online`).\n- **Endpoint validation errors**: Check that the storage account firewall rules allow access from the agent's IP, and that the correct credentials/connection string are provided for the endpoint type.\n- **S3 HMAC auth failures (new in 1.4.0)**: Ensure the `AccessKeyId` and `SecretAccessKey` properties are correctly set on `S3WithHmacEndpointProperties`.\n- File an issue via [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues).\n- Check [previous questions](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/tagged/azure+.net) or ask new ones on Stack Overflow using the `azure` and `.net` tags.\n```\n\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\n\n**Create** `sdk/storagemover/Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover/tests/Samples/Sample1_StorageMoverBasics.cs`:\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Azure.Identity;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover.Models;\nusing NUnit.Framework;\n\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover.Samples\n{\n    public class Sample1_StorageMoverBasics\n    {\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only run in live tests\")]\n        public async Task CreateStorageMover()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:StorageMover_CreateOrUpdate\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(\"myResourceGroup\");\n\n            StorageMoverCollection storageMoverCollection = resourceGroup.GetStorageMovers();\n            StorageMoverData data = new StorageMoverData(new Azure.Core.AzureLocation(\"eastus\"));\n            ArmOperation\u003cStorageMoverResource\u003e lro = await storageMoverCollection.CreateOrUpdateAsync(\n                WaitUntil.Completed,\n                \"myStorageMover\",\n                data);\n            StorageMoverResource storageMover = lro.Value;\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Created StorageMover: {storageMover.Data.Name}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only run in live tests\")]\n        public async Task CreateBlobEndpoint()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:StorageMover_CreateBlobEndpoint\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(\"myResourceGroup\");\n            StorageMoverResource storageMover = await resourceGroup.GetStorageMovers().GetAsync(\"myStorageMover\");\n\n            StorageMoverEndpointCollection endpointCollection = storageMover.GetStorageMoverEndpoints();\n            StorageMoverEndpointData endpointData = new StorageMoverEndpointData(\n                new AzureStorageBlobContainerEndpointProperties(\n                    storageAccountResourceId: new Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier(\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/myRG/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/myStorageAccount\"),\n                    blobContainerName: \"mycontainer\"));\n\n            ArmOperation\u003cStorageMoverEndpointResource\u003e lro = await endpointCollection.CreateOrUpdateAsync(\n                WaitUntil.Completed,\n                \"myBlobEndpoint\",\n                endpointData);\n            StorageMoverEndpointResource endpoint = lro.Value;\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Created endpoint: {endpoint.Data.Name}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only run in live tests\")]\n        public async Task CreateJobDefinitionWithSchedule()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:StorageMover_CreateJobDefinitionWithSchedule\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(\"myResourceGroup\");\n            StorageMoverResource storageMover = await resourceGroup.GetStorageMovers().GetAsync(\"myStorageMover\");\n            StorageMoverProjectResource project = await storageMover.GetStorageMoverProjects().GetAsync(\"myProject\");\n\n            JobDefinitionData jobDefData = new JobDefinitionData(\n                copyMode: StorageMoverCopyMode.Additive)\n            {\n                SourceName = \"myNfsEndpoint\",\n                TargetName = \"myBlobEndpoint\",\n                AgentName = \"myAgent\",\n                // New in 1.4.0: configure a recurring schedule\n                Schedule = new StorageMoverScheduleInfo\n                {\n                    Frequency = StorageMoverScheduleFrequency.Daily,\n                    // ScheduleTime = ...\n                },\n                // New in 1.4.0: enable data integrity validation\n                DataIntegrityValidation = StorageMoverDataIntegrityValidation.Enabled,\n                // New in 1.4.0: preserve permissions\n                IsPermissionsPreserved = true,\n            };\n\n            ArmOperation\u003cJobDefinitionResource\u003e lro = await project.GetJobDefinitions().CreateOrUpdateAsync(\n                WaitUntil.Completed,\n                \"myJobDefinition\",\n                jobDefData);\n            JobDefinitionResource jobDefinition = lro.Value;\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Created job definition: {jobDefinition.Data.Name}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only run in live tests\")]\n        public async Task StartJobRun()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:StorageMover_StartJobRun\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(\"myResourceGroup\");\n            StorageMoverResource storageMover = await resourceGroup.GetStorageMovers().GetAsync(\"myStorageMover\");\n            StorageMoverProjectResource project = await storageMover.GetStorageMoverProjects().GetAsync(\"myProject\");\n            JobDefinitionResource jobDefinition = await project.GetJobDefinitions().GetAsync(\"myJobDefinition\");\n\n            // Start a new job run\n            ArmOperation\u003cJobDefinitionResource\u003e startLro = await jobDefinition.StartJobAsync(WaitUntil.Started);\n\n            // List all runs for this job definition\n            await foreach (JobRunResource run in jobDefinition.GetJobRuns().GetAllAsync())\n            {\n                Console.WriteLine($\"Job run {run.Data.Name}: status={run.Data.Status}\");\n            }\n            #endregion\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\nEach `#region Snippet:\u003cName\u003e` tag corresponds to the `C# Snippet:\u003cName\u003e` placeholder inserted in the README in Step 1.\n\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\n\nThe README at 2026-04-22T00:25:56.6098683Z server:unified callBackendTool: serverID=safeoutputs, toolName=create_issue, args=map[body:## Documentation Gap
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6099083Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6099221Z **Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover`
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6099769Z **Service directory:** `sdk/storagemover/Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover/`
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6100216Z **Triggered by:** commit b8b94c350 (PR #57153) by @azure-sdk
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6100444Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6100524Z ## What Changed
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6100645Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6101100Z A new version (1.4.0) of the StorageMover management library was introduced, upgrading to API version 2025-12-01. The release adds significant new capabilities:
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6101735Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6101928Z - S3 with HMAC authentication endpoints (`S3WithHmacEndpointProperties`)
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6102470Z - Azure Multi-Cloud Connector endpoints (`AzureMultiCloudConnectorEndpointProperties`)
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6103040Z - Azure Storage NFS File Share endpoints (`AzureStorageNfsFileShareEndpointProperties`)
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6103643Z - Job definition scheduling support (`StorageMoverScheduleInfo`, `StorageMoverScheduleFrequency`)
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6104239Z - Data integrity validation for job definitions (`StorageMoverDataIntegrityValidation`)
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6104980Z - New properties: `IsPermissionsPreserved`, `StorageMoverJobTriggerType`, `ScheduledExecutionOn`, `StorageMoverEndpointKind`, `Connections`
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6105489Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6105569Z ## Gaps Found
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6105678Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6106449Z - **Examples section is empty of real code**: The README currently links only to a generic `aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples` URL — no inline code snippets demonstrate creating or using any StorageMover resource
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6107928Z - **Key concepts section lacks service-specific content**: The section points to generic Azure SDK design principles but does not explain StorageMover-specific concepts (Storage Movers, Projects, Agents, Endpoints, Job Definitions, Job Runs, and their relationships)
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6109644Z - **New v1.4.0 features are not documented in the README**: S3/HMAC endpoints, Multi-Cloud Connector endpoints, NFS File Share endpoints, job scheduling, and data integrity validation have no corresponding examples or explanation in the README
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6111065Z - **No custom `tests/Samples/` files with `#region Snippet:` blocks**: Only auto-generated samples exist; there are no hand-crafted samples that walk through common scenarios to be pulled into README via `Update-Snippets.ps1`
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6112436Z - **Troubleshooting section lacks service-specific guidance**: No mention of common issues specific to StorageMover (e.g., agent connectivity, endpoint misconfiguration, job failures)
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6113050Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6113131Z <details>
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6113459Z <summary><strong>📐 Implementation Guide</strong></summary>
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6113693Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6114006Z This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6114391Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6114480Z ### Step 1: Modify files
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6114683Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6114999Z **Edit** `sdk/storagemover/Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover/README.md`:
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6115375Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6115577Z 1. Replace the generic `## Key concepts` section with service-specific content:
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6115862Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6115934Z ```markdown
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6116108Z ## Key concepts
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6116223Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6116402Z The Azure Storage Mover SDK is organized around these core resources:
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6116662Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6117027Z - **StorageMover** (`StorageMoverResource`): The top-level resource representing a storage mover deployment in a resource group.
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6118097Z - **Agent** (`StorageMoverAgentResource`): A registered hybrid compute resource that performs the actual data transfer.
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6118965Z - **Endpoint** (`StorageMoverEndpointResource`): Represents a source or destination for migration jobs. Supported types include:
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6119931Z   - `AzureStorageBlobContainerEndpointProperties` — Azure Blob Storage container
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6120529Z   - `AzureStorageSmbFileShareEndpointProperties` — Azure Files SMB share
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6121134Z   - `AzureStorageNfsFileShareEndpointProperties` — Azure Files NFS share (new in 1.4.0)
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6121785Z   - `NfsMountEndpointProperties` — on-premises NFS mount
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6122181Z   - `SmbMountEndpointProperties` — on-premises SMB share
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6122735Z   - `S3WithHmacEndpointProperties` — S3-compatible storage with HMAC authentication (new in 1.4.0)
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6123470Z   - `AzureMultiCloudConnectorEndpointProperties` — Multi-Cloud Connector endpoint (new in 1.4.0)
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6124100Z - **Project** (`StorageMoverProjectResource`): A logical grouping of related job definitions.
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6124955Z - **Job Definition** (`JobDefinitionResource`): Defines a migration task including source endpoint, target endpoint, associated agent, scheduling, and data integrity settings.
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6125761Z - **Job Run** (`JobRunResource`): An individual execution instance of a job definition.
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6126127Z ```
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6126227Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6126411Z 2. Replace the generic `## Examples` section with snippet placeholders:
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6126671Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6126748Z ```markdown
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6126922Z ## Examples
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6127016Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6127107Z ### Create a Storage Mover
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6127247Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6127356Z ```C# Snippet:StorageMover_CreateOrUpdate
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6127738Z ```
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6127831Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6127928Z ### Create an Azure Blob Container endpoint
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6128112Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6128225Z ```C# Snippet:StorageMover_CreateBlobEndpoint
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6128481Z ```
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6128573Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6128666Z ### Create a job definition with scheduling
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6128839Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6128990Z ```C# Snippet:StorageMover_CreateJobDefinitionWithSchedule
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6129283Z ```
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6129368Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6129450Z ### Start a job run
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6129567Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6129670Z ```C# Snippet:StorageMover_StartJobRun
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6129910Z ```
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6130061Z ```
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6130150Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6130246Z 3. Expand the `## Troubleshooting` section:
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6130421Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6130492Z ```markdown
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6130663Z ## Troubleshooting
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6130783Z 
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6131327Z - **Agent not registering**: Ensure the hybrid compute machine running the agent has outbound connectivity to Azure and that the `ARC_Resource_Bridge` VM extension is installed correctly.
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6132457Z - **Job run stuck in `Queued` state**: Verify the agent assigned to the job definition has a `Connected` status (`StorageMoverAgentStatus.Online`).
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6133518Z - **Endpoint validation errors**: Check that the storage account firewall rules allow access from the agent's IP, and that the correct credentials/connection string are provided for the endpoint type.
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6134592Z - **S3 HMAC auth failures (new in 1.4.0)**: Ensure the `AccessKeyId` and `SecretAccessKey` properties are correctly set on `S3WithHmacEndpointProperties`.
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6135327Z - File an issue via [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues).
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6135726Z - Check [previous questi
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6135936Z ...
2026-04-22T00:25:56.6136157Z (truncated, showing first 65536 bytes of 98641 total)
